title: Negativ → Design System Mapping
description: How every Negativ screen maps to popular design systems and component libraries

mappings.tailwind: Use utility classes from tailwind-patterns.css + messageKey
mappings.shadcn/ui: Import Alert + use messageKey via next-intl or react-i18next
mappings.figma: See figma-component-spec.json — master component with variants

integrationRule: Every screen must resolve copy via messageKey from data/localization/messages/
